title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: Cursor reports that PayPal could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 using AI tools. High-adoption teams are deploying daily and completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade six times faster than baseline.
